title: jasione montana subsp. echinata
intro: Jasione montana subsp. echinata, also known as the mountain cornflower, is a subspecies of flowering plant that belongs to the bellflower family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antispasmodic, and expectorant properties. The health benefits of Jasione montana subsp. echinata include its ability to relieve respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its potential to soothe digestive issues and reduce inflammation. Herbal preparations of Jasione montana subsp. echinata include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall health and well-being.
